突然消失的一群人，一个月后又突然出现。
他们带回来的消息打破了玄黄星长久的平静。
【浮空岛战争】游戏，能进入游戏的人能将游戏中的属性带回现实，更有机会带出游戏中的物品和人。
赵霉运，一个从小就和名字一样的人，有幸被选为第4批【浮空岛战争】游戏的先遣者。
当其他先遣者还在努力建造自己的浮空岛，赵霉运却已经靠着自己的天赋【十倍获取】获得大量物资和人口。
靠着这些物资和人口，赵霉运更是将自身无法改变的霉运，将其转变为强大自身的奖励。
看着越来越大的浮空岛和越来越多的物资，赵霉运：你真的只是十倍获得吗？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/e4a3dbbe7b96c340da74ab56039af017~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"坐不住的迷雾","author_id":"","book_id":"7138209916178664462","book_name":"塔防：我建筑比他人建筑强十倍","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3810人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7138210058143433230","read_count":"3810","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1067770"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"494","tags":"游戏体育,穿越,网游","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b7f67afd6ce7578dff2505a562d9bb29~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180296&x-signature=GzvmVZVwQzMiiGcyzMlSQI8RzgU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3236562383158926","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"519"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320164456A9F1055EFB3B881BFD92"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读26小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":15054,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":93893,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3783},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7168297410958066471","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的精彩，希望作者继续努力写出不
